message:
test(lifecycle): add 40+ edge-case tests for mux lifecycle state machine (ft-3681t.2.1)

Comprehensive edge-case coverage for CopperCompass's lifecycle additions
in session_topology.rs. Tests cover invalid event rejection for all entity
types (Session, Window, Pane, Agent), ForceClose idempotence, multi-cycle
recovery, registry concurrency conflicts, context validation, and full
lifecycle paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
